strengths: ~17 years of engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, and platform work across multiple industries and tech stacks
Demonstrated entrepreneurial instinct: founded GISCollective, built open-source tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, vibe.dav), and shipped public-facing products
Recent hands-on AI and agentic infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows
concerns: No director-level IC, technical strategy, or customer-advisory experience — all roles are individual contributor developer positions with no evidence of shaping organizational or product AI direction
AI expertise is nascent (roughly 6 months at re:cinq) and lacks recognized publications, platform-scale AI products, or industry visibility required for an AI Strategy principal
Currently in an unplanned career gap since October 2025 with no stated trajectory toward technical leadership or AI strategy specialization
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable and versatile senior engineer with genuine breadth and an entrepreneurial mindset, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role is a director-level IC position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated ability to advise enterprise customers on AI adoption, and a track record of influencing technical strategy at scale — none of which are evidenced in this resume. His AI exposure is limited to a short recent tenure, and his career history shows depth in execution rather than strategic leadership or thought leadership in AI.
